evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Ensures high quality delivery of software consulting services and overall client satisfaction
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Mixed: quality/satisfaction language appears alongside sales-pipeline-driving and services-delivery speed framing, without a dominant single signal.
evidence.domain_risk: Overall knowledge of MHE technologies and warehouse systems or similar domains is preferred
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: Logistics/supply chain consulting context affecting business decisions without explicit financial reporting or regulatory language.
evidence.collaboration_width: sales organization; business, data architect, other technical resources
evidence.data_team_maturity: As part of this global team of software experts, you will help develop robust organizational capabilities
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: An established Software Center of Excellence and services program already exist; the role extends and grows the analytics services offering rather than building from zero.
evidence.jd_authorship: Experience working with data visualization and analytics tools such as Tableau, PowerBI, QlikView, or Superset is required
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Named tools and specific consulting tasks (requirements analysis, sales-phase presentations) give some precision, but bullets like 'proven success in Client Management' are generic boilerplate, producing a mixed profile.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: Supports the sales organization and drive pipeline generation of analytics consulting services
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: The role is explicitly tied to sales pipeline generation and customer-facing consulting engagements, placing it in commercial.
evidence.autonomy_level: you will own end-to-end implementation of analytics engagements with Dematic customers
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: The role owns full engagement delivery and is a 'key voice' for program development (strategic) while also supporting sales and executing customer requests (execution).
evidence.ai_role_explanation: No mention of AI tools for the candidate or AI-consuming data infrastructure anywhere in the JD.
evidence.testing_framing: No testing or data quality signal.
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: No testing, data contracts, observability, or data quality language appears anywhere in the JD.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: None: the JD is framed entirely around delivery, sales, and client satisfaction with no risk or compliance register.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: Drives development and documentation of services
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: Mix of developing new services/solutions (greenfield) and delivering/documenting existing consulting services (fix_scale) with no dominant direction.
